# Daily Report — 2026-04-28

## Task Completed
Added asset management tools for the ServiceNow `alm_asset` table: `list_assets`, `get_asset`, and `update_asset`. `list_assets` supports filters for asset tag, display name, install status, assigned user, and model category with pagination. `get_asset` resolves assets by either `sys_id` or asset tag. `update_asset` supports patching all common fields (status, cost, dates, assignment, location). Reference fields (model, vendor, assigned_to, etc.) are normalised to their display value. Tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (under `system_administrator` and `full` packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 802 (+ 35 new)
- Coverage: 90% overall; asset_tools.py at 99%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Environment-level findings only (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) — no vulnerabilities introduced by this change.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/asset_tools.py` (new)
- `tests/test_asset_tools.py` (new)
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml`

## Next Up
Add `create_asset` tool and/or add `alm_hardware` subclass support to asset tools.
